codeReview.summary: The original failing feature diff (3ee7680) correctly wired both switcher test files into OpenBurnBarTests target membership but lacked successful scoped execution evidence. The fix feature transcript explicitly reran both required scoped xcodebuild -only-testing commands and recorded exitCode 0 for SwitcherProfileStoreTests and SwitcherBrowserLaunchTests, closing the contract gap. Current pbxproj still includes both files in group and sources entries, with no observed target-membership regression.
